Issue: Claude API billing failed.
Subject: Billing
Generated Response:
Happy to help.

Claude API usage is billed via prepaid usage credits. These credits must be purchased before use and are applied to your usage according to the pricing. You can track your credit usage and set up auto-reloads on the Billing page in your Claude Console settings. If you run out of credits, API access will be suspended. Failed requests are not charged, but you will be billed for successful API calls and completed tasks. You may also be charged if your client disconnects or times out during a successful API call.

For paid API contracts, you can update your billing address in the Claude Console under Settings -> Billing -> Billing Addresses.

Reference:
https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8977456-how-do-i-pay-for-my-claude-api-usage

Issue: My card was charged twice. I forgot my password. Can you refund me?
Subject: Multiple issues
Generated Response:
Happy to help.

### How to Address Your Concerns

**Double Charged Card:**
To dispute a charge, please contact your card issuer or bank. The contact number is usually found on the front or back of your Visa card. They will require detailed information about the transaction to resolve the issue.

**Forgotten Password:**
To log in to your credit card account, please visit your issuer or bank's website. The website and freephone number (free when dialling from within the USA) can be found on your Visa card. If you need further assistance, please call Visa.

**Refunds:**
For refunds related to Visa Traveller's Cheques, you will need to provide the cheque serial numbers, where and when you bought them, how and when you believe they were lost or stolen, and the issuer of the cheques. Refunds can typically be arranged within 24 hours, subject to terms and conditions.

### Reference

https://www.visa.co.in/support.html

### Overview

If you are unable to log in to your HackerRank account, please try the following solutions:

1.  **Verify Credentials:** Ensure you are using the correct email address and password. If you signed up using a third-party service (like Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, or GitHub), use that service to log in.
2.  **Reset Password:** If you have forgotten your password, select the "Forgot Password" option on the login page to reset it.
3.  **Browser Cache:** Clear any saved passwords from your browser and try logging in again.

If you continue to experience issues, please contact HackerRank support at [help@hackerrank.com](mailto:help@hackerrank.com).

Issue: My subscription renewal failed because my payment method expired. How can I update it?
Subject: Billing
Generated Response:
Happy to help.

### Overview

To update your billing details for your existing paid Claude subscription, please follow these steps:

### Steps

1. Click on your initials or name in the lower left corner and select “Settings” from the menu.
2. Navigate to [Settings > Billing](http://claude.ai/settings/billing).
3. Click the "Update" button next to your payment method.
4. Enter your new billing details in the payment update form.
5. Click "Update" to save your changes.

Your updated payment method will be charged the next time your subscription renews.

### Reference

https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8325618-paid-plan-billing-faqs
